productDisplayName: Calvin Klein Men Be 100 ml Perfume
description: Be by calvin klein for men comes in a dark glass bottle styled to look like an alcohol flask. This scent has been a popular choice for over 15 years - it was launched in 1996. This perfume opens with tones of bergamot, juniper berry, mandarin, mint, lavender and white musk, melting into softer heart of light spices, magnolia, peach and white musk. The dry-down has tones of sandalwood, opoponax and bean. Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
